## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you want.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternatives you've considered.

## Scope and Impact

Who benefits, and what parts of LimitLens are affected (CLI, menu bar, core, packaging)?

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, references, or sample outputs.
